source: RuneQuest Starter Set Book 2: The World of Glorantha (2021)

shopping_examples.summary: Book 2 gives example prices for cloaks, clothes, dresses, drinks, food, guards, heralds, horses, inns, jewelry, labor, lamps, instruments, research, riding gear, sacrifice, tools, and torches.

healing_for_hire.summary: Suggested donations are given for first aid, disease treatment, poisoning treatment, magical healing, regrowing limbs, resurrection, and other healing spells.
